title: Tanya Rohauer
compiled_truth: Tanya Rohauer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-28), Tanya Rohauer sent 192 and received 1868 emails, totalling 2060 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (87), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (47), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (21), [Marie Heard](people/marie-heard) (19), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (17).
